Claude high-risk keepUnresolved: Image-dependent ROW (POV multi-lane highway with overhead blue sign, red car ahead) prompts "driving in the center lane is not permitted in this situation". None of the top-5 candidates (q0255 no-overtake / q0292 leave-highway / q0229 overtake-right / q0259 ramp / q0562 fog-light) speak to center-lane restriction; q0255 is a requires-review qid. No tag agreement supports any candidate — route to human. [answer-key A=Verdadero filled: q0644 master correctRow=R matches the Spanish statement polarity]

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Override: blue rectangular with red top bar and white vertical = dead-end sign (q0822 image tags: T/hammer, blue/white/red). Master q0822 D="dead-end road" → Spanish A "Vía sin salida". Matcher top-1 q0786 was wrong (text-only confusion).

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Override: Spanish prompt is about forged/altered LICENSE PLATE (not driver license). Master q0449 "uses falsified license plate" correct C=12-point → Spanish D=12 points. Matcher q0981 (driver license) was a topic confusion. q0981 in requires-review list.

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows yellow car top-view with BOTH side doors open. Master q0523 "doors of both sides not closed lights" = R → Spanish A=Verdadero. Matcher proposed q0537 (left door) — wrong; image shows both.

Claude medium-risk approveExistingQid: POV at highway exit/deceleration ramp. Master q0391 "lights when entering speed-reducing lane" correct D="right-turn signal" → Spanish B "right turn signal". Matcher q0974 (weather/snow) was wrong.

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: ROW + image agreement — Spanish prompt "two red lights flashing alternately at railway crossing, stop and wait" matches q0649 verbatim; tag overlap (railway-crossing, red-car, traffic-light, warning-sign) with q0649's stored tags (train, railroad, red-car, double-red, red-signal). Master correctRow=R → Spanish A=Verdadero.

Claude low-risk approveExistingQid: Override: Spanish exact-match to master q0279 "driver drives after drinking is subject to 12-point penalty" = R → Spanish A=Verdadero. Matcher q0312 (different statement about license detention) — wrong; q0279 not in top-5.

Confusion pair q0476→q0493 ruled out: q0493 is about a stopped car at bus station, not driving.
